description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa upholstered in a dark brown, textured fabric. The sofa features a single, thick seat cushion and a continuous, slightly curved backrest with three evenly spaced, fabric-covered buttons for subtle decorative tufting. Both armrests are wide, rounded, and heavily padded, extending from the front edge to the backrest in a classic rolled-arm style. The sofa sits on four short, blocky legs that are finished in black and are only partially visible beneath the base. The upholstery has a woven appearance, giving the surface a matte, slightly rough texture. The overall design is sturdy and inviting, suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark brown, two-seater sofa with rolled arms, a single seat cushion, and a subtly tufted backrest, upholstered in textured fabric. The design is compact, sturdy, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width, rolled armrests, single seat cushion, and three-button tufted backrest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thick, rounded armrest and the sofa's depth, with the seat and backrest profile visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous, gently curved backrest and the full fabric covering, with no visible buttons or cushions.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the rounded armrest and the sofa's overall depth and structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, thick seat cushion and a continuous backrest with three attached, evenly spaced tufted buttons; all cushions are attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Both armrests are present, wide, and heavily padded with a classic rolled profile, extending from the seat height to the top of the backrest with no decorative contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, finished in black, with a simple, sturdy appearance and slightly recessed placement.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a gentle curve and three decorative tufted buttons; the backrest is fully attached and padded.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is a solid dark brown with a visible woven texture, giving a matte, slightly rough appearance and no additional decorative stitching.
